title: Constraint Schema
description: Hard rules or temporary limitations in the world or story.

target_id.description: ID of the specific region, character, or faction if scope is not global.

rule.description: The constraint itself (e.g., 'magic cannot create calories').

reason.description: Why this constraint exists (e.g., 'broken rib', 'laws of physics').

is_temporary.description: Whether this constraint can be lifted or resolved during the story.
